title: pyrenacantha lobata
intro: Pyrenacantha lobata is a plant species belonging to the family Icacinaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pyrenacantha lobata include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of Pyrenacantha lobata can be made into infusions or decoctions for internal use, as well as being applied topically for external applications.
